chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2515 of 2023 Muhammad Akram Versus Election Commission of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 06.09.2024 None present. -.-.- There are questions regarding maintainability of this petition, as identified on 24.05.2023. No one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner to assist the Court. By-elections purportedly under challenge in this petition were held on 28.05.2023 and as of now apparently this petition has become infructuous, however, since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
